case_title: WILBER ALVITES VS. JUAN CARLOS SANTILLI

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT WRITTEN LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALVITES, WILBER

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALVITES, WILBER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANTILLI, JUAN CARLOS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 805 AMAZON AVE. (SECOND ROOM ON THE RIGHT), S.F. CA. 94112, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT JUAN SANTILLI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 8, 2008. THERE WAS NO PROPER SERVICE. THE PLAINTIFF WAS GIVEN A CHANCE TO FILE HIS OPPOSITION. OPPOSITION TO BE FILED AND SERVED BY DECEMBER 3, 2008. THE DEFENDANT TO COME BACK ON THE EX PARTE CALENDAR TOMORROW FOR FURTHER STAY OF EVICTION. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
